title: Sea & Beach themed gui
description: I introduce you my sea and beach themed gui ! I really love the beach and for my beach lovers out there I hope you'll like it as much as I do 💗
body:
It is my first texture pack it is not complete only the gui. It is beach themed and a bit of sea themed in it too, everything is customized but of course it is not perfect so if you have any recommendations I'd be happy to hear them. I really hope you guys enjoy this gui and if you have any recommendations I'd be happy to work on it again 💗

It is a gui inspired par "sea shore texture pack pvp" by 2ove 🐚💗
